prompt: Create a photorealistic full-body fashion editorial street portrait of a young woman wearing a futuristic cooling poncho outfit on a sunny urban sidewalk. The model is a tall young blonde woman with long windblown hair, fair skin, blue eyes, and a calm confident expression, walking toward the camera with one leg forward. She wears a glossy translucent white hooded poncho made from lightweight technical fabric, oversized and cape-like with a high zippered front, short white shorts barely visible underneath, and white strappy high-heel sandals. The poncho has exactly 6 visible technical details: a clear structured hood/visor, a central dark zipper, two vertical side zipper seams, two dark rectangular mesh ventilation panels near the lower sides, and small blue-gray trim accents suggesting built-in cooling fans or airflow channels. The outfit should feel like a chic summer UV-protection cooling garment, airy and protective while leaving the legs exposed. Set the scene on a modern city shopping street with glass storefronts on the left, leafy green trees and planters on the right, and distant pedestrians softly blurred. Use bright midday sunlight, sharp highlights on the glossy fabric, dappled tree shadows on the pavement, gentle breeze moving the hair and poncho hem, shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, realistic lens perspective, high-end fashion photography, vertical 4:5 composition, full body centered, no text, no logos, no watermark.

promptZh: 创作一张照片级写实的全身时尚街拍肖像，展示一位年轻女性在阳光明媚的城市人行道上身穿未来感降温斗篷。模特为 一位高挑的年轻金发女性，留着长长的秀发，肤色白皙，蓝眼睛，表情从容自信，正迈步向镜头走来。她身穿 一件由轻量化科技面料制成的光泽感半透明白色连帽斗篷，斗篷呈超大斗篷状，前襟带有高拉链，内搭隐约可见的白色短裤，脚踩白色绑带高跟凉鞋。斗篷需具备 6 个清晰可见的科技细节：透明结构化兜帽/遮阳板、中央深色拉链、两条垂直侧拉链缝线、下摆两侧各一个深色矩形网状通风板，以及暗示内置冷却风扇或气流通道的小型蓝灰色饰边。整体造型应呈现出时尚夏季防紫外线降温服饰的质感，既轻盈透气又具防护性，同时露出双腿。场景设定在 一条现代城市购物街，左侧为玻璃店面，右侧有绿树和花坛，远处行人背景虚化。采用明亮的中午阳光，光泽面料上呈现锐利的高光，人行道上有斑驳的树影，微风拂动发丝和斗篷下摆，浅景深，自然肤色，真实的镜头透视，高端时尚摄影风格，4:5 竖构图，全身居中，无文字，无 Logo，无水印。
